## Checklist

- [ ] I did **not** commit secrets, API keys, or `.env.local`
- [ ] I ran lint and it passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] I ran unit tests if applicable (`npm run test`)
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed (README, docs/)
- [ ] I added `.env.example` entries for any new environment variables
- [ ] The UI is consistent with the existing style (if this is a UI change)
- [ ] I kept the PR focused — one thing changed
